title: oxytropis deflexa subsp. foliolosa
intro: Oxytropis deflexa subsp. foliolosa, also known as a type of subalpine milkvetch, is a flowering plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help in treating various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Oxytropis deflexa subsp. foliolosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
